title: Health Insurance Essentials
meta-title: Essential Information about the Health Insurance Marketplace®
meta-description: Get information about your health insurance options and the Health Insurance Marketplace® at Healthcare.gov
bite: Get information about your health insurance options and the Health Insurance Marketplace® at Healthcare.gov
seo-keywords: health care savings health insurance savings marketplace savings affordable coverage
excerpt: Get information about your health insurance options and the Health Insurance Marketplace® at Healthcare.gov
content:
Will you save? Do a quick check

When you apply for Marketplace coverage, you may be eligible for premium tax credits and other savings on a private insurance plan.

Cost-sharing reductions

When you get coverage through the Marketplace, you may be able to save money on out-of-pocket-costs like deductibles, copayments, and coinsurance.

What plans cover

Learn about essential and other health benefits that all health insurance plans offered in the Health Insurance Marketplace® cover.

Appeal a Marketplace Decision

How to save on your monthly insurance bill with a premium tax credit

When you get health insurance coverage in the Marketplace, you may be able to get lower costs on your premiums.

How to pick a plan

Use this guide to help you understand how to compare plans and choose one that’s right for you.

Dental coverage in the Marketplace

In the Health Insurance Marketplace®, you generally can get dental coverage as part of a health plan or by itself through a separate, stand-alone dental plan.

Preventive health services

Most health plans must cover a set of preventive services like shots and screening tests at no cost to you. This includes Marketplace private insurance plans.
